option_line: gaDHO_justFoundArrayEndElek:Talk to Academician Elek at the Galatia Academy first
original: Talk to Academician Elek at the Galatia Academy first

option_line: gaDHO_justFoundArrayEndAbyss:Why wait? Go straight to the coordinates in the Abyss
original: Why wait? Go straight to the coordinates in the Abyss

option_line: 3:gaDHO_visitElekStart2:Ask where you could find the office of Cornelius Elek
original: gaDHO_visitElekStart2:Ask where you could find the office of Cornelius Elek

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltIntro2b:"They probably didn't make it. I'm sorry."
original: They probably didn't make it. I'm sorry.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltIntro2c:"If they're not back yet, they're probably dead."
original: If they're not back yet, they're probably dead.

option_line: gaDHO_abyssEndElekIntro1:"Yes. It worked. It gave me coordinates in the Abyss and I went there."
original: Yes. It worked. It gave me coordinates in the Abyss and I went there.

option_line: gaDHO_abyssEndElekIntro1:"Right. It worked, gave me coordinates in the Abyss, and I went there."
original: Right. It worked, gave me coordinates in the Abyss, and I went there.

option_line: gaDHO_abyssEndElekMyData:"Fine. We can talk about MY discovery first. Then payment."
original: Fine. We can talk about MY discovery first. Then payment.

option_line: gaDHO_abyssEndElekMyDiscovery:"It's MY discovery. And we'll talk about payment if you want any part in it."
original: It's MY discovery. And we'll talk about payment if you want any part in it.

option_line: gaDHO_abyssEndFoundFirst:"First, I want to talk about what I found. It was... hazardous."
original: First, I want to talk about what I found. It was... hazardous.
